# TLS certificate files — generated by scripts/generate-dev-certs.sh
# For production, provide real CA-signed certificates here.
#
# Expected files:
#   server.crt   — PEM-encoded X.509 certificate (or full chain for real CA)
#   server.key   — PEM-encoded private key (keep secret, never commit)
#
# Generate dev certs:
#   ./scripts/generate-dev-certs.sh
